title: VRF + GRE: FINANCE VRF'i Tunnel0 ile R11-R22 Arasında Uzat (R11 tarafı), VRF Static Routing
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
Do not remove any existing configurations from the devices.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: A colleague started configuring a new network. All configurations on R22 are complete and communication between R11 and R22 is functional. Complete the configurations on R11 for the tasks below.
Task 1: Extend the FINANCE VRF between R11 and R22 using Tunnel 0.
Task 2: Complete the FINANCE VRF configuration on R11 and configure static routing so that traffic between VLAN 111 and VLAN 222 uses Tunnel 0 exclusively.
Note: Sw11 can be used to validate traffic flow.
hints: VRF'i once interface'e ata ('ip vrf forwarding FINANCE'), SONRA IP adresini yaz — VRF atamasi mevcut IP'yi siler.
Tunnel kaynak/hedefi GLOBAL tablodadir: source e0/0, destination R22'nin ISP yuzu 209.165.201.2. Tunnel0 IP'si 10.11.22.1/30.
VLAN 111'e giden trafik Sw11 uzerinden (10.11.11.2); VLAN 222'ye giden trafik Tunnel'in karsi ucu uzerinden (10.11.22.2) — boylece VLAN'lar arasi trafik yalnizca Tunnel0'i kullanir.
answer_key_raw:
R11:
R11> enable
R11# configure terminal
R11(config)# interface Ethernet0/1
R11(config-if)# ip vrf forwarding FINANCE
R11(config-if)# ip address 10.11.11.1 255.255.255.252
R11(config-if)# no shutdown
R11(config-if)# exit
R11(config)# interface Tunnel0
R11(config-if)# ip vrf forwarding FINANCE
R11(config-if)# ip address 10.11.22.1 255.255.255.252
R11(config-if)# tunnel source Ethernet0/0
R11(config-if)# tunnel destination 209.165.201.2
R11(config-if)# no shutdown
R11(config-if)# exit
R11(config)# ip route vrf FINANCE 10.10.111.0 255.255.255.0 10.11.11.2
R11(config)# ip route vrf FINANCE 10.10.222.0 255.255.255.0 10.11.22.2
R11(config)# end
R11# write
explanation: Item 31'in R11 varyantı (son item): Tunnel0 FINANCE VRF içine alınır ve 10.11.22.1/30 IP'si verilir; tünel global adresler üzerinden kurulur (source e0/0, destination R22'nin ISP yüzü 209.165.201.2). e0/1 de aynı VRF'e alınıp 10.11.11.1/30 verilir. VRF statik rotaları: VLAN111 ağı Sw11 üzerinden (10.11.11.2), VLAN222 ağı tünelin karşı ucu üzerinden (10.11.22.2) — böylece VLAN'lar arası trafik yalnızca Tunnel0'ı kullanır.
